reviews.text:
I have previously attended London Gynaecology and received good service, which makes this experience particularly disappointing. During a recent emergency, the standard of care was extremely poor.

The ultrasound machine was not working initially, which I was patient and understanding about. However, further issues followed. I requested copies of my scan images, which were important due to the emergency, yet it took several days to receive them and only after chasing multiple times. There was no sense of urgency or clear communication.

I also asked for blood tests to be carried out, which were refused, despite the NHS hospital later confirming they were appropriate and offering to do them. Most concerning of all, I was misdiagnosed, which was later confirmed by the NHS hospital.

During an already stressful and time-sensitive situation, the lack of urgency, poor coordination, and incorrect diagnosis were unacceptable. I will not be attending this clinic again and would not recommend it based on my experience.

My partner was left extremely distressed after her scan due to a clear misdiagnosis. She was devastated and spent days in tears as a result. When you pay for a private service, you expect accuracy, professionalism, and expertise — none of …
Really disappointed with my experience here. Poor customer service and lack of transparency on pricing. When you pay a premium for a service, I would have expected better.

Why are you declining my numerous calls to ask for an update on this charge???
Receptionists charged my insurance for a HPV vaccine package consisting 3 doses. I signed the document at the beginning of my appointment highlighting my insurance coverage. They asked me to pay (210 additional pounds) stating the consultant I saw is not covered under my insurance, despite them cancelling and rescheduling my appointment at the last minute - changing my consultant from one who is insured to one who isn't. Instead of rightfully refunding me, they told me they will contact my insurance to check if they can cover the mistake the receptionist made. So they have been paid for the vaccine coverage, and also random additional costs which they would rather keep than refunding. They cancelled my appointment last minute, and none of the many receptionists knew what to do! I was told my jab would be done by a nurse, and even the 'consultant' who isn't insured didn't ask me any questions/discussed anything, just gave me the jab and it was done. Weird how I have been charged for my injections and also, a 210 pound mistake that they have owed up to, but rather would profit and ask the insurance to cover their bums as opposed to just refunding me. Money hungry place that has so many receptionists but none of them know what to do.

Whilst this clinic may be good at dealing with other / straightforward gynaecological matters, I found the consultant I saw to be disappointing. She was truly compassionate in terms of the physical pain and emotional distress I was in which was great, but was lacking in medical knowledge around things I would expect any gynaecologist to be well versed in. She was unable to diagnose a textbook case of vulvodynia, looked up on her computer how to deal with recurrent thrush, and when given a full history of my symptoms and concerns, said multiple times that it's a 'mystery' - not comforting words to hear from a specialist you've paid substantial money to see. Ultimately, after the tests, the mystery remained, the explanation was insufficient, and the treatment suggested was not suitable and did not work. She did not get to the bottom of the issue. I eventually got an answer and solution from the NHS a few months later from a gynaecologist that knew her stuff.

Regarding the clinic itself, the only nice thing I can say is that the waiting room was nice and well equipped. Aside from this, waiting times were terrible - especially given this is a private clinic. Communication about delays was poor and on one occasion, I travelled in, waited a long time, only for the consultant to then tell me that the test results I'd come in to discuss had not even been received and we had nothing to discuss. This was known prior to my appointment and should have been communicated. They then said they would not charge for that appointment, but still did.

Overall, I would not recommend this clinic. Other consultants here might be good but even the waiting times and terrible communication is enough to put me off. There are plenty of better private clinics to go in London.
The procedure gone really badly and need now a full surgery. I regret i went there!

The gynaecologists are professional. But the receptionist Justina, and some other managers unpleasant, full of ego and lack of empathy. That’s a Shame.
Beware of prideful ladies at this office who lack experience and training.

The receptionist and nurses were very nice. However, the doctor seems to be busy, she was pausing and checking her schedule/ next appointment, and also she forgot to do my smear test which I have specified in my booking request. Disappointed by the experience given it’s private, but you got an NHS equivalent treatment
